message:
refactor(lab/meta): improve mutation testing and task handle safety

Meta testing infrastructure:
- mutation.rs: Significant refactoring of mutation operators for better
  coverage and more targeted mutations
- runner.rs: Improved mutation test runner with better reporting

Runtime improvements:
- task_handle.rs: Enhanced task handle with better cancellation handling
  and resource cleanup

New tests:
- repro_race_leak.rs: Reproduction test for race condition and resource
  leak detection scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
